home.title: Discover Your Perfect Style
home.subtitle: AI-powered virtual try-on and personalized outfit recommendations.

virtualTryOn.title: AI Virtual Try-On
virtualTryOn.description: See how clothes look on you before buying. Upload your photo and try on any garment instantly.

smartWardrobe.title: Smart Wardrobe
smartWardrobe.description: Organize your clothes digitally. Upload, categorize, and manage your entire wardrobe in one place.

outfitRecommendations.title: Outfit Recommendations
outfitRecommendations.description: Get AI-powered outfit suggestions based on your wardrobe and personal style preferences.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: What is the difference between Fashion Rec and the many similar services already available in the market?
faq.a1: 1. Fashion Rec is a service designed for individual users. 2. It features a smart wardrobe for convenient personal clothing management. 3. It is affordable, and free users can also enjoy full functionality.
faq.q2: How do I use the AI virtual try-on?
faq.a2: Upload your photo and the garments you want to try. Our AI will generate the try-on results automatically. You can start in the Studio page.
faq.q3: If I don't plan to pay, is this website useless to me?
faq.a3: Absolutely not. We believe people will always pay for quality service. Even if you subscribe to the free plan, you can still enjoy all core features.
faq.q4: What is the difference between Free and Premium?
faq.a4: The Free plan offers 2 try-on per day with core features and history saving. Premium includes more try-ons and advanced features.
faq.a5: We take privacy and security seriously. All uploaded photos and data are stored with encryption and never shared with third parties.
faq.a6: JPG, PNG, WEBP and other common formats are supported. Clear portrait photos provide the best results.
faq.q7: How do I manage my wardrobe?
faq.a7: After signing in, go to "My Wardrobe" to add, edit, or delete items.
